morning.title: Introducing MAI-Code-1-Flash
morning.summary: Microsoft introduces MAI-Code-1-Flash, a new AI model for coding tasks.

morning.title: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw
morning.summary: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw, which can perform various tasks independently.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM's CEO expresses skepticism about the financial returns on investing in AI data centers.

morning.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
morning.summary: Microsoft releases a new tool allowing developers to create AI behavior tests using text descriptions.

morning.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in four months
morning.summary: Uber imposes limits on employee AI spending after exceeding budget in just four months.
